No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.
The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Defendant Community Housing Partnership's Motion For Bifurcation Of Discovery (Per Stipulation Of Parties). The parties entered into a stipulation to continue the hearing to June 17, 2015 at 9:00 a.m in Dept. 302 to be heard by Judge Pro Tem Catalanotti. Stipulation and order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter C. Catalanotti. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn For Bifurcation Of Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Steven D. Werth, Esq. of Allen Glaessner Hazelwood Werth, Tel. 415.697.3462; and
Charmaine Yu, Esq. of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP, Tel. 415.772.5729, for defendant and moving party;
Edwin Aiwazian, Esq. of Lawyers for Justice, PC, Tel. 818.265.1020, for plaintiff and opposing party, via Court Call.

RULING: All parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court took DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP's Motion For Bifurcation Of Discovery under submission. Parties are to submit a proposed order by noon on Tuesday, January 20, 2015. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn For Bifurcation Of Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Jan-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP's Motion For Bifurcation Of Discovery is continued to January 16, 2015 at 9:00 am because the Court did not receive courtesy copies of the motion or opposition papers. The parties shall provide courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers to the Court by 9am on January 12, 2015. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
